_comment: Runtime recolor is mask-driven: a tk2d atlas is recolored only when CloakMasks/<tk2d collection name>/<texture>.png exists (then optional CloakMasks/<compat alias>/ e.g. Knight for Player Prefab, then legacy CloakMasks/<texture>.png). Missing masks are left untouched.
_comment_maskDiag: When true, logs CloakMaskManager mask path resolution (primary / alias / legacy). Optional; omit noise from debugLogging + scanner.
_comment_mapIcon: When true, logs SSMP compass/map-icon sync (without cloak scanner noise unless debugLogging is on).
_comment_heroMesh: CloakRecolor re-scans the player MeshRenderer list every N frames; material re-apply is still every LateUpdate. Lower (e.g. 1) fixes spike-death / attack meshes appearing mid-animation; higher saves CPU.
_comment_dumpTex: Master switch: when false, no -original.png or empty mask templates are written (allowlist ignored). When true: existing-mask path writes -original.png beside an on-disk mask; missing-mask path uses missingMaskDumpAllowlist.
_comment_allowDump: When dumpDiscoveredTextures is true: missing-mask dumps (-original + empty template) only for Texture.name stems in this list (tk2d folders + CloakMasks/Texture2D/). Empty allowlist = no missing-mask auto-dump.
_comment_allowDump_sactx: Allowlisted sactx-* stems are for Texture2D sweep/auto-dump when Unity loads a Texture2D with that exact Object.name. They do not replace tk2d masks (CloakMasks/<collection>/atlasN.png). SpriteRenderer-only sequences use CloakMasks/Texture2D/<stem>.png (see CloakSpriteRendererTint).
_comment_allowlistSweep: When dumpDiscoveredTextures is true: optional missingMaskDumpAllowlistSweepDelaysSec — seconds after load, each value waits then scans loaded Texture2D assets for allowlisted stems still missing CloakMasks/Texture2D/<stem>.png. Example: [10, 120, 600]. Omit or [] to disable.
